revision.text: {{hatnote|For a list of all pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]], see [[Special:PrefixIndex/Help:]] (omits "Help:" in display) or [[Special:AllPages/Help:]] (has start page feature).}} [[Special:AllPages]] is a [[Help:Special page|special page]] which shows an alphabetical index of all pages in a given [[WP:Namespace|namespace]]. Articles (also called [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. Some articles like [[eBay]] use a [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|certain method]] to display lowercase 'e' on the article page but the real title "EBay" is listed at [[Special:AllPages/EBay]]. [[Help:Redirect|Redirects]] are shown in ''italics''. Registered users can hide redirects by saving .allpagesredirect {display:none;} in {{yourcss}}. Some articles like [[Titanic (1997 film)|''Titanic'' (1997 film)]] show italics at top of their page but not at [[Special:AllPages/Titanic (1997 film)]]. Italics always means a redirect in [[Special:AllPages]]. Click "Next page" or "Previous page" at the top or bottom to see more entries. Each page has 345 entries. The [[English Wikipedia]] has {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles as of {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. [[Special:Search]] is a more practical way to find pages for most purposes. See [[Help:Searching]] for search features, including how to limit a search to a specific prefix and selected namespaces. The field "{{int:allpagesto}}" is only useful when used together with "{{int:allpagesfrom}}". Otherwise the list starts at the beginning of all pages and you may have to click "Next page" thousands of times to reach the chosen end page. {{As of|2024|1}}, the final page is the redirect [[􏿿]], the last non-redirect is [[🥺]], and the last real article is [[𝼝]]. [[Special:AllPages]] is updated automatically by [[MediaWiki]] which powers Wikipedia. The entries can only be changed by changing the names of the actual pages. [[WP:DELETE|Deleted]] pages are not listed. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes]] * [[:mw:Help:All pages]] {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Reader help]] [[Category:Wikipedia features]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] [[Category:Wikipedia directories]]

{{hatnote|For a list of all pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]], see [[Special:PrefixIndex/Help:]] (omits "Help:" in display) or [[Special:AllPages/Help:]] (has start page feature).}} [[Special:AllPages]] is a [[Help:Special page|special page]] which shows an alphabetical index of all pages in a given [[WP:Namespace|namespace]]. Articles (also called [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. Some articles like [[eBay]] use a [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|certain method]] to display lowercase 'e' on the article page but the real title "EBay" is listed at [[Special:AllPages/EBay]]. [[Help:Redirect|Redirects]] are shown in ''italics''. Registered users can hide redirects by saving .allpagesredirect {display:none;} in {{yourcss}}. Some articles like [[Titanic (1997 film)|''Titanic'' (1997 film)]] show italics at top of their page but not at [[Special:AllPages/Titanic (1997 film)]]. Italics always means a redirect in [[Special:AllPages]]. Click "Next page" or "Previous page" at the top or bottom to see more entries. Each page has 345 entries. The [[English Wikipedia]] has {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles as of {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. [[Special:Search]] is a more practical way to find pages for most purposes. See [[Help:Searching]] for search features, including how to limit a search to a specific prefix and selected namespaces. The field "{{int:allpagesto}}" is only useful when used together with "{{int:allpagesfrom}}". Otherwise the list starts at the beginning of all pages and you may have to click "Next page" thousands of times to reach the chosen end page. {{As of|2024|1}}, the final page is the redirect [[􏿿]], the last non-redirect is [[🥺]], and the last real article is [[𝼝]]. [[Special:AllPages]] is updated automatically by [[MediaWiki]] which powers Wikipedia. The entries can only be changed by changing the names of the actual pages. [[WP:DELETE|Deleted]] pages are not listed. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes]] * [[:mw:Help:All pages]] {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Reader help]] [[Category:Wikipedia features]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] [[Category:Wikipedia directories]]

{{hatnote|For a list of all pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]], see [[Special:PrefixIndex/Help:]] (omits "Help:" in display) or [[Special:AllPages/Help:]] (has start page feature).}} [[Special:AllPages]] is a [[Help:Special page|special page]] which shows an alphabetical index of all pages in a given [[WP:Namespace|namespace]]. Articles (also called [[WP:NAMESPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. Some articles like [[eBay]] use a [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|certain method]] to display lowercase 'e' on the article page but the real title "EBay" is listed at [[Special:AllPages/EBay]]. [[Help:Redirect|Redirects]] are shown in ''italics''. Registered users can hide redirects by saving .allpagesredirect {display:none;} in {{yourcss}}. Some articles like [[Titanic (1997 film)|''Titanic'' (1997 film)]] show italics at top of their page but not at [[Special:AllPages/Titanic (1997 film)]]. Italics always means a redirect in [[Special:AllPages]]. Click "Next page" or "Previous page" at the top or bottom to see more entries. Each page has 345 entries. The [[English Wikipedia]] has {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles as of {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. [[Special:Search]] is a more practical way to find pages for most purposes. See [[Help:Searching]] for search features, including how to limit a search to a specific prefix and selected namespaces. The field "{{int:allpagesto}}" is only useful when used together with "{{int:allpagesfrom}}". Otherwise the list starts at the beginning of all pages and you may have to click "Next page" thousands of times to reach the chosen end page. {{As of|2024|1}}, the final page is the redirect [[􏿿]], the last non-redirect is [[🥺]], and the last real article is [[𝼝]]. [[Special:AllPages]] is updated automatically by [[MediaWiki]] which powers Wikipedia. The entries can only be changed by changing the names of the actual pages. [[WP:DELETE|Deleted]] pages are not listed. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes]] * [[:mw:Help:All pages]] {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Reader help]] [[Category:Wikipedia features]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] [[Category:Wikipedia directories]]

{{hatnote|For a list of all pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]], see [[Special:PrefixIndex/Help:]] (omits "Help:" in display) or [[Special:AllPages/Help:]] (has start page feature).}} [[Special:AllPages]] is a [[Help:Special page|special page]] which shows an alphabetical index of all pages in a given [[WP:Namespace|namespace]]. Articles (also called [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. Some articles like [[eBay]] use a [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|certain method]] to display lowercase 'e' on the article page but the real title "EBay" is listed at [[Special:AllPages/EBay]]. See [[Help:Searching]] for search features, including how to limit a search to a specific prefix and selected namespaces. The field "{{int:allpagesto}}" is only useful when used together with "{{int:allpagesfrom}}". Otherwise the list starts at the beginning of all pages and you may have to click "Next page" thousands of times to reach the chosen end page. {{As of|2024|1}}, the final page is the redirect [[􏿿]], the last non-redirect is [[🥺]], and the last real article is [[𝼝]]. [[Special:AllPages]] is updated automatically by [[MediaWiki]] which powers Wikipedia. The entries can only be changed by changing the names of the actual pages. Articles (also called [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. The field "{{int:allpagesto}}" is only useful when used together with "{{int:allpagesfrom}}". [[Special:Search]] is a more practical way to find pages for most purposes. See [[Help:Searching]] for search features, including how to limit a search to a specific prefix and selected namespaces. Articles (also called [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{hatnote|For a list of all pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]], see [[Special:PrefixIndex/Help:]] (omits "Help:" in display) or [[Special:AllPages/Help:]] (has start page feature).}} [[Special:AllPages]] is a [[Help:Special page|special page]] which shows an alphabetical index of all pages in a given [[WP:Namespace|namespace]]. Articles (also called [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. Some articles like [[:en:EBay|EBay]] use a [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|certain method]] to display lowercase 'e' on the article page but the real title "EBay" is listed at [[Special:AllPages/EBay]]. [[Help:Redirect|Redirects]] are shown in ''italics''. Registered users can hide redirects by saving .allpagesredirect {display:none;} in {{yourcss}}. Some articles like [[:en:Titanic (1997 film)|''Titanic'' (1997 film)]] show italics at top of their page but not at [[Special:AllPages/Titanic (1997 film)]]. Italics always means a redirect in [[Special:AllPages]]. Click "Next page" or "Previous page" at the top or bottom to see more entries. Each page has 345 entries. The [[:en:English Wikipedia|English Wikipedia]] has {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles as of {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. [[Special:Search]] is a more practical way to find pages for most purposes. See [[Help:Searching]] for search features, including how to limit a search to a specific prefix and selected namespaces. The field "{{int:allpagesto}}" is only useful when used together with "{{int:allpagesfrom}}". Otherwise the list starts at the beginning of all pages and you may have to click "Next page" thousands of times to reach the chosen end page. {{As of|2024|1}}, the final page is the redirect [[:en:􏿿|􏿿]], the last non-redirect is [[:en:🥺|🥺]], and the last real article is [[:en:𝼝|𝼝]]. [[Special:AllPages]] is updated automatically by [[:en:MediaWiki|MediaWiki]] which powers Wikipedia. The entries can only be changed by changing the names of the actual pages. [[WP:DELETE|Deleted]] pages are not listed. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes]] * [[:mw:Help:All pages]] {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Reader help]] [[Category:Wikipedia features]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Wikipedia features]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24543431184|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{hatnote|For a list of all pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]], see [[Special:PrefixIndex/Help:]] (omits "Help:" in display) or [[Special:AllPages/Help:]] (has start page feature).}} [[Special:AllPages]] is a [[Help:Special page|special page]] which shows an alphabetical index of all pages in a given [[WP:Namespace|namespace]]. Articles (also called [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]]) is the default namespace. Pages cannot start with a lowercase letter but they can start with many special characters which may be listed before or after letters. Some articles like [[:en:EBay|EBay]] use a [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|certain method]] to display lowercase 'e' on the article page but the real title "EBay" is listed at [[Special:AllPages/EBay]]. [[Help:Redirect|Redirects]] are shown in ''italics''. Registered users can hide redirects by saving .allpagesredirect {display:none;} in {{yourcss}}. Some articles like [[:en:Titanic (1997 film)|''Titanic'' (1997 film)]] show italics at top of their page but not at [[Special:AllPages/Titanic (1997 film)]]. Italics always means a redirect in [[Special:AllPages]]. Click "Next page" or "Previous page" at the top or bottom to see more entries. Each page has 345 entries. The [[:en:English Wikipedia|English Wikipedia]] has {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles as of {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. [[Special:Search]] is a more practical way to find pages for most purposes. See [[Help:Searching]] for search features, including how to limit a search to a specific prefix and selected namespaces. The field "{{int:allpagesto}}" is only useful when used together with "{{int:allpagesfrom}}". Otherwise the list starts at the beginning of all pages and you may have to click "Next page" thousands of times to reach the chosen end page. {{As of|2024|1}}, the final page is the redirect [[:en:􏿿|􏿿]], the last non-redirect is [[:en:🥺|🥺]], and the last real article is [[:en:𝼝|𝼝]]. [[Special:AllPages]] is updated automatically by [[:en:MediaWiki|MediaWiki]] which powers Wikipedia. The entries can only be changed by changing the names of the actual pages. [[WP:DELETE|Deleted]] pages are not listed. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes]] * [[:mw:Help:All pages]] {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Reader help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]
